records.m_Talk_ENG: So...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You didn't buy food with the money, but you bought this tiny data pad piece of junk?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You didn't buy food with the money, but you bought this tiny data pad piece of junk?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You didn't buy food with the money, but you bought this tiny data pad piece of junk?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course! Everything that's buried there is worth so much more than this data pad!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course! Everything that's buried there is worth so much more than this data pad!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course! Everything that's buried there is worth so much more than this data pad!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How are you sure that it's really the Great Pirate's treasure map? What if he just told you a made-up story to sell some junk?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How are you sure that it's really the Great Pirate's treasure map? What if he just told you a made-up story to sell some junk?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How are you sure that it's really the Great Pirate's treasure map? What if he just told you a made-up story to sell some junk?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, there's no doubt about it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, there's no doubt about it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, there's no doubt about it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ex-pirates with beards never lie!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ex-pirates with beards never lie!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ex-pirates with beards never lie!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's even worse than saying nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's even worse than saying nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's even worse than saying nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: At least the rest of the money is with Captain. She'll buy some proper food...
records.m_Talk_DEU: At least the rest of the money is with Captain. She'll buy some proper food...
records.m_Talk_FRA: At least the rest of the money is with Captain. She'll buy some proper food...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Sharks! I bring good news!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Sharks! I bring good news!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Sharks! I bring good news!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing as how you're empty-handed, I'm guessing you didn't buy food either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing as how you're empty-handed, I'm guessing you didn't buy food either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing as how you're empty-handed, I'm guessing you didn't buy food either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kya hah hah, aren't you a witty one!
records.m_Talk_VTN: Kya hah hah, c9580 th86{t th9580ng m95znh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kya hah hah, aren't you a witty one!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kya hah hah, aren't you a witty one!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...* Whatever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...* Whatever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...* Whatever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll get the food. Just give me the money.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll get the food. Just give me the money.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll get the food. Just give me the money.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? I have no cash left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? I have no cash left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? I have no cash left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, what on earth did you buy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, what on earth did you buy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, what on earth did you buy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I got us a ship. It's got a big cannon too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I got us a ship. It's got a big cannon too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I got us a ship. It's got a big cannon too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You used all that money to get a ship?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You used all that money to get a ship?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You used all that money to get a ship?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh, Captain! That's what I'm talkin' about!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh, Captain! That's what I'm talkin' about!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh, Captain! That's what I'm talkin' about!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you serious? What about our meals? We haven't had any meat for a month.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you serious? What about our meals? We haven't had any meat for a month.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you serious? What about our meals? We haven't had any meat for a month.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Plus, the hunters are surely coming after us, but we haven't solved the bounty problem yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Plus, the hunters are surely coming after us, but we haven't solved the bounty problem yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Plus, the hunters are surely coming after us, but we haven't solved the bounty problem yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. I can't be a disgraceful pirate that borrows others' ships! I'd rather starve and be chased my whole life!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. I can't be a disgraceful pirate that borrows others' ships! I'd rather starve and be chased my whole life!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. I can't be a disgraceful pirate that borrows others' ships! I'd rather starve and be chased my whole life!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Agreed! You're the captain! And the captain of the pirates never walks around on land!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Agreed! You're the captain! And the captain of the pirates never walks around on land!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Agreed! You're the captain! And the captain of the pirates never walks around on land!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh... You two just really...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh... You two just really...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh... You two just really...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, by the way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, by the way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, by the way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Apparently, they used this as a fishing boat before the former owner modified it. Sounds like you can use fishing nets on this thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Apparently, they used this as a fishing boat before the former owner modified it. Sounds like you can use fishing nets on this thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apparently, they used this as a fishing boat before the former owner modified it. Sounds like you can use fishing nets on this thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I'd like Sonya's grilled fish rather than any meat above ground.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I'd like Sonya's grilled fish rather than any meat above ground.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I'd like Sonya's grilled fish rather than any meat above ground.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can fish, even without a net.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can fish, even without a net.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can fish, even without a net.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, how are we going to make money again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, how are we going to make money again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, how are we going to make money again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll have you know that we can't sell fish while being chased.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll have you know that we can't sell fish while being chased.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll have you know that we can't sell fish while being chased.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No worries.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No worries.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No worries.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The seas of Front Bay are full of lucrative opportunities!

records.m_Talk_DEU: The seas of Front Bay are full of lucrative opportunities!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The seas of Front Bay are full of lucrative opportunities!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Found you, Sawshark Jackie!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Found you, Sawshark Jackie!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Found you, Sawshark Jackie!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This played-out chase ends here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This played-out chase ends here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This played-out chase ends here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Got the camera? We won't get the bounty if we don't have video evidence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Got the camera? We won't get the bounty if we don't have video evidence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Got the camera? We won't get the bounty if we don't have video evidence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. Let's go.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. Let's go.
